null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Deccan Herald, citing IMD: Kolkata's season-low minimum of 11°C on Dec 31, 2025 (2.8°C below normal), cold snap continuing into early January. ERA5 grid-cell value 9.6°C; ~1.4°C station-vs-cell gap.

Daily Jagran, citing an IMD yellow alert: heavy rainfall of 7-11 cm forecast for Kolkata for Jul 29, 2025, with active monsoon rain confirmed the day before. Forecast-consistent; no official post-event observed total found.
